## Checklist

- [ ] `xcodebuild -project Breaks.xcodeproj -scheme Breaks build` is clean
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible
- [ ] No new entitlements added without justification
- [ ] No new third-party dependencies
